---
title: "Chelsea 'Old Church': A worked example with `baytaAAR`"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
bibliography: ../inst/REFERENCES.bib
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Chelsea 'Old Church': A worked example with `baytaAAR`}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup, echo = F}
library(baytaAAR)
library(nimble)
```
